title: Settings

general.launch_at_login_desc: Start Mole automatically when you log in to macOS

notifications.enable_notifications_desc: Show alert when clean, optimize, or purge finishes
notifications.notifications_blocked: Blocked in System Settings — enable in macOS Notifications
notifications.go_to_system_settings: Go to System Settings → Notifications → Mole to enable.

footer: Mole runs silently in the menu bar. Close the window to hide it; use the menu-bar icon to show it or quit.
